props.type: Layout style. 1 (default) settles + zooms on hover, 2 reveals a gradient caption, 3 is horizontal, 4 has a frosted caption, 5 pops the caption over the image, 6 parallaxes the image on scroll, 8 dodges the cursor, 9 follows the cursor, 10 flips to a back face when the cursor is near, 11 is a Tinder-style swipe deck, 12 an X feed post, 13 a Facebook post, 14 an Instagram post.
props.parallax: Type 6 only — how far (px) the image drifts across a full scroll pass. Higher is more intense (default 280).
props.image: Image URL for the card media (shorthand for the `img` slot).
props.title: Heading text (shorthand for the `title` slot).

slots.title: Heading shown above the text.
slots.interactions: Buttons overlaid on the image (likes, comments, …).
slots.front: Front face of the flip card (type 10).
slots.back: Back face of the flip card (type 10).
slots.avatar: Avatar shown in the header (social types 12–14).
slots.header: Name / handle / meta beside the avatar (social types 12–14).
slots.buttons: A footer row of actions below the text.
slots.default: Free-form content appended inside the card.
